description: Receipt in Arabic script for a payment by Mūsā [ben] Naʿīm, dated 1824/25 CE (the end of Muḥarram 1240H). The receipt was issued by the state silk monopoly administration in Alexandria.
tags: Alexandria, late Arabic script, 19th c, seal, receipt, Ben Na'im
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
